tasks.subject: Task 1: music-service enumerate() runner
tasks.description:
**Goal:** yt-dlp -J --flat-playlist 로 재생목록을 열거해 {label, entries, total, truncated} 를 반환하는 enumerate() 추가.

**Files:** music-service/src/runner.ts, music-service/tests/runner.test.ts

**Verify:** cd music-service && npm test -- runner

```json:metadata
{"files": ["music-service/src/runner.ts", "music-service/tests/runner.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd music-service && npm test -- runner", "acceptanceCriteria": ["enumerate parses label+entries (id->watch url)", "maxPlaylist slice + total/truncated", "empty_playlist / enumerate_parse / reject / nonzero-exit throw", "stdout fully consumed"], "planRef": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-music-playlist-extract.md#task-1"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: music-service POST /enumerate endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /extract 와 동일 인증·에러 규약으로 POST /enumerate 추가 + 부트 env 와이어링.

**Files:** music-service/src/server.ts, music-service/tests/server.test.ts

**Verify:** cd music-service && npm test -- server

```json:metadata
{"files": ["music-service/src/server.ts", "music-service/tests/server.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd music-service && npm test -- server", "acceptanceCriteria": ["401 no bearer / 400 no source / 200 result", "bad_source->400, 타임아웃->504, else->502", "enumerateFn injectable + MUSIC_MAX_PLAYLIST/MUSIC_ENUMERATE_TIMEOUT_MS wired"], "planRef": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-music-playlist-extract.md#task-2"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: bridge /music/enumerate relay
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 브릿지 POST /music/enumerate 추가 → music-service /enumerate 재-Bearer 릴레이. 공통 proxyMusic 추출.

**Files:** bridge/src/music.ts, bridge/src/server.ts, bridge/src/music.test.ts

**Verify:** cd bridge && node --test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/music.ts", "bridge/src/server.ts", "bridge/src/music.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && node --test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["enumerate 401/400/503-not_configured/503-unavailable", "forwards to /enumerate with re-Bearer + {source}", "existing handleMusicExtract tests still pass"], "planRef": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-music-playlist-extract.md#task-3"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: app enumeratePlaylist() client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 앱 extractClient.ts 에 브릿지 /music/enumerate 호출 enumeratePlaylist() 추가. ExtractError/STATUS_TO_KIND 재사용.

**Files:** app/src/lib/musicExtract/extractClient.ts, app/tests/unit/musicExtract/extractClient.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npm run test -- extractClient

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/musicExtract/extractClient.ts", "app/tests/unit/musicExtract/extractClient.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- extractClient", "acceptanceCriteria": ["not_configured + no fetch", "parses result, posts to /music/enumerate with Bearer/{source}/signal", "status->kind mapping + network", "empty entries -> upstream_error"], "planRef": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-music-playlist-extract.md#task-4"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: app parseExtractNote block-walk refactor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** parseExtractNote 를 블록 순회로 리팩터 → 일반 줄=재생목록 / 불릿=단일 곡 판별 유니온 ExtractItem.

**Files:** app/src/lib/musicExtract/parseExtractNote.ts, app/tests/unit/musicExtract/parseExtractNote.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npm run test -- parseExtractNote

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/musicExtract/parseExtractNote.ts", "app/tests/unit/musicExtract/parseExtractNote.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- parseExtractNote", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ExtractItem single|playlist union", "text line list= URL -> playlist; next 플레이리스트: header -> done", "bullets -> single (exclude /files URL)", "header+result list not sources", "existing single tests pass; exports playlistSourceOf/isPlaylistHeaderText"], "planRef": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-music-playlist-extract.md#task-5"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: app writePlaylistBlock
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 성공 트랙 URL들을 소스 줄 아래에 음악:: 호환 [ ]플레이리스트: 헤더 + mp3 불릿 블록으로 삽입하는 writePlaylistBlock.

**Files:** app/src/lib/musicExtract/writePlaylistBlock.ts (신규), app/src/lib/musicExtract/writeExtractResult.ts (urlChild export), app/tests/unit/musicExtract/writePlaylistBlock.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npm run test -- writePlaylistBlock

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/musicExtract/writePlaylistBlock.ts", "app/src/lib/musicExtract/writeExtractResult.ts", "app/tests/unit/musicExtract/writePlaylistBlock.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- writePlaylistBlock", "acceptanceCriteria": ["inserts [ ]checkbox header + mp3 bullets (text===href) below source", "inlineCheckbox-absent schema -> [ ] text fallback", "existing result header / no match / empty urls / destroyed view -> false", "parseMusicNote recognizes block when checked"], "planRef": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-music-playlist-extract.md#task-6"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: app playlist block .note round-trip test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 생성 블록이 .note 직렬화→역직렬화 후 mp3 href·헤더·체크박스 보존 + 체크 시 parseMusicNote 트랙 인식 검증 (tomboyUrlLink href 유실 함정 방지).

**Files:** app/tests/unit/musicExtract/playlistBlockRoundtrip.test.ts (신규)

**Verify:** cd app && npm run test -- playlistBlockRoundtrip

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/tests/unit/musicExtract/playlistBlockRoundtrip.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- playlistBlockRoundtrip", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unchecked block round-trips: mp3 hrefs + 플레이리스트: header + inlineCheckbox preserved", "checked block round-trips -> parseMusicNote restores label+track urls"], "planRef": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-music-playlist-extract.md#task-7"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: app runExtractButtonClick playlist branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ⟳ 진행에서 single/playlist 분기 — 재생목록은 열거→곡별 추출→블록 삽입 + 요약 토스트(곡 수·재생목록 수·잘림).

**Files:** app/src/lib/editor/musicExtractNote/runExtractButtonClick.ts, app/tests/unit/editor/musicExtractNote/runExtractButtonClick.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npm run test -- runExtractButtonClick

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/musicExtractNote/runExtractButtonClick.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/musicExtractNote/runExtractButtonClick.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- runExtractButtonClick", "acceptanceCriteria": ["single flow unchanged (extract/❌/systemic-stop)", "playlist: enumerate->sequential extract->writePlaylistBlock; per-track fail skipped; systemic stop", "summary toast: 재생목록 N개(M곡)/X곡 추출/Y곡 실패/상한 초과", "existing single-song tests still pass"], "planRef": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-music-playlist-extract.md#task-8"}
```

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

{"files": ["app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["playlist=plain line / single=bullet rule + copy [ ]플레이리스트: block to 음악:: note", "cap 50 + RD mix dynamic vs list=PL…/OLAK5uy…", "existing guide-card pattern kept"], "planRef": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-music-playlist-extract.md#task-9"}
